theme: Fibre & Digital Infrastructure Buildout (5G + BharatNet + AI Data Centres)
why: India's 5G densification, BharatNet rural broadband rollout, and AI-driven data-centre capex are creating a multi-year supercycle for optical fibre cable makers and telecom solution providers.

early.why: rural fibre rollout exposure, lagged mover
network infra adjacent, low volume so far

why: Global supply chains actively diversifying away from China are directing pharma, agrochemical, and fluorochemical intermediate orders to Indian producers, reigniting a valuation re-rating across the sub-sector.

early.why: integrated value chain, underperformed peers recently
pharma API intermediates, barely moved today

why: A weaker rupee combined with rising US generics demand and a shift toward high-value specialty drugs is driving broad-based institutional buying across mid- and small-cap pharma exporters.

early.why: domestic generics giant, lagged export re-rating
injectables niche, low move vs peers today
US generics heavy, yet to reflect rupee tailwind

theme: Domestic Capital Goods & Defence Electronics Order Surge
why: A surge in government defence electronics orders and infrastructure capex is translating into large visible order books for mid-cap capital-goods and defence-electronics manufacturers.

early.why: defence electronics leader, modest move today
power electronics capex play, minimal move
defence avionics exposure, lagged the rally
